com.hp.workpath.api.scanner

Class FileOptionsAttributes.Builder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.FileOptionsAttributes.Builder
  • Enclosing class:
    FileOptionsAttributes

    public static class FileOptionsAttributes.Builder
extends java.lang.Object
    Builder for creating FileOptionsAttributes containing file options parameters.
    Since:
    API 1

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Builder()
      Default constructor to create a new Builder with default attributes: PDF encryption password = null OCR language = DEFAULT PDF compression mode = DEFAULT TIFF compression mode = DEFAULT XPS compression mode = DEFAULT

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      FileOptionsAttributes build(FileOptionsAttributesCaps caps)
      Combines all of the attributes into a FileOptionsAttributes object.
      FileOptionsAttributes.Builder setOcrLanguage(FileOptionsAttributes.OcrLanguage ocrLanguage)
      Sets the value of the ocrLanguage property.
      FileOptionsAttributes.Builder setPdfCompressionMode(FileOptionsAttributes.PdfCompressionMode pdfCompressionMode)
      Sets the value of the pdfCompressionMode property.
      FileOptionsAttributes.Builder setPdfEncryptionPassword(java.lang.String pdfEncryptionPassword)
      Sets the value of the pdfEncryptionPassword property.
      FileOptionsAttributes.Builder setTiffCompressionMode(FileOptionsAttributes.TiffCompressionMode tiffCompressionMode)
      Sets the value of the tiffCompressionMode property.
      FileOptionsAttributes.Builder setXpsCompressionMode(FileOptionsAttributes.XpsCompressionMode xpsCompressionMode)
      Sets the value of the xpsCompressionMode property.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Builder

        public Builder()
        Default constructor to create a new Builder with default attributes:
        • PDF encryption password = null
        • OCR language = DEFAULT
        • PDF compression mode = DEFAULT
        • TIFF compression mode = DEFAULT
        • XPS compression mode = DEFAULT
        Since:
        API 1

    • Method Detail

      • setPdfEncryptionPassword

        public FileOptionsAttributes.Builder setPdfEncryptionPassword(java.lang.String pdfEncryptionPassword)
        Sets the value of the pdfEncryptionPassword property.
        Parameters:
        pdfEncryptionPassword - password
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if pdfEncryptionPassword is null
        Since:
        API 1

      • setOcrLanguage

        public FileOptionsAttributes.Builder setOcrLanguage(FileOptionsAttributes.OcrLanguage ocrLanguage)
        Sets the value of the ocrLanguage property.
        Parameters:
        ocrLanguage - language
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if ocrLanguage is null
        Since:
        API 1

      • setPdfCompressionMode

        public FileOptionsAttributes.Builder setPdfCompressionMode(FileOptionsAttributes.PdfCompressionMode pdfCompressionMode)
        Sets the value of the pdfCompressionMode property.
        Parameters:
        pdfCompressionMode - mode
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if pdfCompressionMode is null
        Since:
        API 1

      • setTiffCompressionMode

        public FileOptionsAttributes.Builder setTiffCompressionMode(FileOptionsAttributes.TiffCompressionMode tiffCompressionMode)
        Sets the value of the tiffCompressionMode property.
        Parameters:
        tiffCompressionMode - mode
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if tiffCompressionMode is null
        Since:
        API 1

      • setXpsCompressionMode

        public FileOptionsAttributes.Builder setXpsCompressionMode(FileOptionsAttributes.XpsCompressionMode xpsCompressionMode)
        Sets the value of the xpsCompressionMode property.
        Parameters:
        xpsCompressionMode - mode
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if xpsCompressionMode is null
        Since:
        API 1

      • build

        public FileOptionsAttributes build(FileOptionsAttributesCaps caps)
                            throws CapabilitiesExceededException
        Combines all of the attributes into a FileOptionsAttributes object.
        Returns:
        FileOptionsAttributes object containing all of the attributes.
        Throws:
        CapabilitiesExceededException - if caps does not contain the set attribute value.
        Since:
        API 1
